visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with short dark hair, wearing glasses and a grey flat cap over a white t-shirt, stands in a brightly lit indoor studio. He speaks directly to the camera with an expressive face and animated hand gestures. (2) The scene cuts to the same man leaning over a glass display counter in a mobile phone retail store, showcasing various smartphone models including Vivo, Oppo, and Realme under bright store lighting. (3) The video returns to the studio setting where the man continues his narration; graphical search bar overlays appear in the center with icons of the Statue of Liberty and a hairdryer. (4) A series of screen recordings follow, demonstrating the YouTube mobile interface with AI-generated highlights and summaries for travel and product reviews, featuring footage of beaches and people using headphones. (5) A graphic transition shows a white background with a US flag and the YouTube Premium logo. (6) The man is shown again in the studio, now appearing more contemplative, rubbing his chin and looking directly at the camera while discussing potential downsides for creators. (7) Finally, he gestures toward his wrist and points to the camera in a call-to-action pose against the same plain studio backdrop.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有趣思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko 米可手機館. [Slogan]: 手機破盤價，米可殺很大！ [Subtitle]: YouTube也加入AI戰局！ (2) [Subtitle]: 推薦大家買手機到米可. (3) [Subtitle]: 最近YouTube推出一項類似Google AI總結的一個新功能，可以直接用AI回答你的影片搜尋問題，例如在YouTube搜尋紐約自由行的景點，或是哪支吹風機好用。 (4) [Subtitle]: 畫面上方就會出現一段精選影片的片段，下面則是AI生成的重點摘要還有推薦影片，不用每部影片都點開看，直接就可以重點解答！ (5) [Variety]: 💡. [Subtitle]: 但目前這項功能只開放美國部分Premium用戶測試。 (6) [Subtitle]: 而且僅限英文影片，測試只到7月底。 (7) [Subtitle]: 聽起來好像對於用戶很方便，但YouTube創作者不免就要擔心了，如果觀眾都看AI摘要的話，那點擊跟觀看時數會不會就下滑了？ (8) [Variety]: 💦. [Subtitle]: 所以你支持這種AI摘要嗎？還是寧願自己慢慢找影片來看，跟我說。

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged male with glasses, a grey patterned flat cap, and a white t-shirt. He wears a beaded bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary background is a plain off-white wall in a studio. Secondary background is a smartphone retail store with glass cases and product signs for brands like Vivo and Oppo. Tertiary background includes screen captures of a mobile app UI.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker with a high-energy, authoritative voice introduces the topic over an upbeat electronic pop background track. The voice is clear with sharp articulation. (2) A subtle 'ding' sound effect triggers as a promotional message for a mobile store is delivered with a friendly, persuasive tone. (3) The speaker transitions into a descriptive narrative about YouTube AI, maintaining a fast but clear speech rate. A faint digital 'click' sound accompanies the appearance of visual graphics. (4) The acoustic environment remains consistent, with the BGM providing a rhythmic foundation while the narrator explains technical features in a professional, explanatory tone. (5) A whoosh transition effect marks a shift in visual content as the speaker details the regional restrictions of the AI feature. (6) The tone shifts slightly toward a contemplative and slightly slower speech rate as the narrator discusses the potential impact on content creators, introducing a sense of skepticism or concern. (7) The video concludes with a direct question to the audience, the voice returning to a high-arousal, engaging tone before the music fades out abruptly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Technical Detail -> Restriction -> Concern -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform viewers about the new YouTube AI search summary feature while analyzing its potential pros for users and cons for creators, ultimately driving engagement through a question.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal recommendation to buy phones at 'Miko' and permanent logos on the screen.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high information density through both speech and text overlays, characteristic of social media tech news formats.
